videos.title: Highlights from Åsarna Ski Marathon 2026
videos.description:
Highlights from Åsarna Ski Marathon 2026

The Ski Classics Challengers event, the Åsarna Ski Marathon, took place last Saturday, featuring a 48km long-distance ski race in classic technique in Åsarna, Sweden. Watch the highlights here!

Video: Åsarna Ski Marathon

videos.title: THE MILLIONAIRE IS BACK HOME AGAIN

videos.title: Birkebeinerrennet 2022
videos.description: The Birkebeinerrennet is one of the oldest and biggest ski marathons in the world. It is part of the Worldloppet Ski Federation.

videos.title: VICTORY IN BRUKSVALLARNA AND WATCHING CONTEST!
videos.description:
A victory at the premier in Bruksvallarna and watching contest. Guess which one of me, Stina Nilsson, Calle Halfvarsson and Teodor Peterson can fit most Juleskum in our mouth and win a Craft Spirit Fuseknit jacket. 

Comment down below NAME and AMOUNT of the person you think will win. One girl and one boy will be selected next week. Good luck!

videos.title: SYND 8 1 79 HIGHLIGHTS OF MONOLITT CROSS-COUNTRY RACE SKIING
videos.description:
(8 Jan 1979) Highlights of Monolitt cross-country ski-race, including shots of winner Thomas Wassberg and runner up lars Erik Erikson crossing the finishing line.
